tools.name: lookup_town
tools.description: Look up a caller's town to find their assigned territory and local livestock specialist. Call this IMMEDIATELY when the caller mentions their location.

town_name.description: The name of the town the caller is near

tools.name: create_lead
tools.description: Creates a new lead when caller wants follow-up. Always ask permission first.
tools.execution_message_description: Creating your information in our system

ranch_name.description: The name of the ranch or operation

county.description: County where the ranch is located

primary_interest.description: What they are interested in or need help with

specialist_name.description: The specialist's full name from lookup_town

tools.name: schedule_callback
tools.description: Schedule a return call OR leave a message for a specific staff member. Use this tool whenever a caller says 'tell X...', 'leave a message for X', 'have X call me back', or 'can I talk to X' and they agree to a message instead of a live transfer. Writes to the callbacks table and emails the specialist if their email is provided. For live transfer requests to LPS staff, use transfer_call_tool instead.

reason.description: Why they want a call. Use 'message' when leaving a note for a specific staff member to pass along. Use 'callback' for scheduled return calls.

callback_timeframe.description: General timeframe if no specific time

specialist_name.description: The specialist's full name from lookup_town

message_content.description: The message content when the caller is leaving a note for a specific person (not scheduling a future callback).

tools.name: query_knowledge
tools.description: Searches Supabase knowledge base for technical cattle nutrition, breeding, health, and ranch management answers. Use when caller asks how-to questions or needs expert advice.
tools.execution_message_description: Let me check our ranch consultation guides

question.description: The caller's question about cattle management

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Searches Purina product catalog for specific products or details

query.description: Search term like product name or keyword

category.description: Product category like Minerals, Protein Supplements, Complete Feeds

livestock_type.description: Type of livestock the product is for

tools.name: get_recommendations
tools.execution_message_description: Finding the best recommendations for you

livestock_type.description: Type of livestock like beef cattle, dairy cattle, horses

need.description: Specific need like winter feeding, minerals, protein supplement

tools.name: get_warehouse
tools.description: Gets warehouse locations, hours, and addresses

warehouse_code.description: Warehouse code like Dillon or Miles

region.description: Region name to search for like Southwest Montana

tools.name: lookup_staff_by_name
tools.description: Look up a Montana Feed Company staff member BY NAME. Use this when a caller asks for someone by name — e.g., 'I need Sheryl Shea', 'Can I talk to Brady', 'Is Austin there?'. Do NOT use this for territorial routing (use lookup_town for that). Returns match_count (0, 1, or many) and a list of matches with their id, full_name, role, email, phone, and is_lps flag. When match_count is 1 and is_lps is true, offer the caller BOTH a live transfer (via transfer_call_tool) AND the option to leave a message (via schedule_callback with reason='message'). When is_lps is false (managers, warehouse, corporate staff like Sheryl), only offer to leave a message — they don't take live transfers. When match_count is 0, offer the main office at 406-728-7020.

name.description: The name the caller gave, as you heard it. Can be a first name ('Sheryl'), last name ('Shea'), or full name ('Sheryl Shea').

_note: REFERENCE FILE — Retell agent config is managed in the Retell dashboard. Keep this file in sync as the source-of-truth reference for tool schemas, descriptions, and transfer destinations. Any changes here MUST be copied into the Retell dashboard manually (or via the Retell API) to take effect. Last updated 2026-04-09.
